posts.author: chriskohlstaedt (Chris Kohlstaedt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Our church, and many others, utilize Planning Center Online for our services, volunteer management, check-ins, giving, etc. As one of (if not the) biggest digital platforms for churches, it would be great if Monday and PCO could integrate + talk to each other.

What are you trying to achieve

I would love to see the Monday team work with Planning Center Online (PCO) to establish and integration between the two platforms.
